all.en: Welcome to module three of our global communication training series.
all.zh: 歡迎參加全球溝通訓練系列課程的第三模組。

all.en: Today, we will explore how cultural context shapes business interactions.
all.zh: 今日我們將探討文化脈絡如何形塑商業互動。

all.en: Our company now operates in more than thirty countries worldwide.
all.zh: 我們公司目前營運據點遍布全球 30 多國。

all.en: Misunderstandings often arise not from language but from cultural assumptions.
all.zh: 誤解往往並非來自語言，而是源自文化假設。

all.en: Researcher Erin Meyer identifies eight key dimensions of cultural difference.
all.zh: 研究者 Erin Meyer 提出八項關鍵的文化差異面向。

all.en: These dimensions include communication style, feedback, and decision making.
all.zh: 這些面向包括溝通風格、回饋方式與決策模式。

all.en: Some cultures prefer direct feedback delivered in front of peers.
all.zh: 有些文化偏好在同事面前直接給予回饋。

all.en: Others view such openness as embarrassing or even disrespectful.
all.zh: 其他文化則視這種坦率為尷尬甚至不尊重。

all.en: When in doubt, deliver constructive criticism in a private setting.
all.zh: 若有疑慮，請在私下場合提供建設性批評。

all.en: Time perception also varies significantly across regions and industries.
all.zh: 時間觀念也因地區與產業不同而有顯著差異。

all.en: Linear-time cultures expect punctuality and tight meeting agendas.
all.zh: 線性時間文化要求準時並嚴守會議議程。

all.en: Flexible-time cultures may treat schedules as guidelines rather than rules.
all.zh: 彈性時間文化可能將時程視為指引而非規定。

all.en: Neither approach is right or wrong, only different.
all.zh: 兩種做法並無對錯，只是有所不同。

all.en: Hierarchical cultures expect decisions to flow from senior leaders downward.
all.zh: 階層型文化期待決策由高層向下傳達。

all.en: Egalitarian cultures expect open debate and shared ownership of choices.
all.zh: 平權型文化期待公開辯論並共同承擔決策。

all.en: When working across these styles, always check who needs to be consulted.
all.zh: 跨風格合作時，務必確認需徵詢哪些人意見。

all.en: Avoid using slang, sports metaphors, or holiday references in global meetings.
all.zh: 全球會議中避免使用俚語、運動比喻或節慶典故。

all.en: These references may not translate well across audiences.
all.zh: 這些指涉在不同文化的聽眾間未必能順利轉譯。

all.en: Be patient when a colleague pauses before answering a question.
all.zh: 當同事在回答前停頓時，請保持耐心。

all.en: Silence in some cultures signals thoughtful consideration, not confusion.
all.zh: 在某些文化中，沉默代表深思熟慮而非困惑。

all.en: Confirm shared understanding by summarizing decisions in writing afterward.
all.zh: 事後以書面摘要決策內容，以確認彼此理解一致。

all.en: Build relationships through informal chats whenever travel allows.
all.zh: 差旅許可時，請藉非正式交談建立關係。

all.en: Trust developed face to face often unlocks faster collaboration online.
all.zh: 面對面建立的信任，往往能加速線上協作。

all.en: Please complete the reflection exercise before next week class.
all.zh: 請於下週上課前完成省思練習。

all.en: The exercise asks you to recall a recent cross-cultural misunderstanding.
all.zh: 練習要求您回想最近一次跨文化的誤解。

all.en: Describe what happened and which dimension might explain the gap.
all.zh: 描述事件經過，並指出哪項面向可能解釋此落差。

all.en: Then propose two strategies you could try in a similar future situation.
all.zh: 接著針對未來類似情境提出兩項可行策略。

all.en: Submit your reflection through the learning portal by Sunday evening.
all.zh: 請於週日晚間前透過學習平台繳交您的省思。

all.en: Reading materials and case studies are linked in the resource section.
all.zh: 閱讀資料與案例研究已連結於資源區。

all.en: Optional one-on-one coaching sessions are available with our facilitators.
all.zh: 可選擇與講師進行一對一輔導課程。

all.en: Coaching slots fill up quickly, so please book early through Outlook.
all.zh: 輔導時段名額有限，敬請儘早透過 Outlook 預約。

all.en: Module four will focus on negotiation styles across Asia and Europe.
all.zh: 第四模組將聚焦亞洲與歐洲的談判風格。

all.en: We will also welcome a guest speaker from our partner agency in Seoul.
all.zh: 我們也將邀請來自首爾合作機構的客座講者。

all.en: Thank you for your active engagement throughout today's training session.
all.zh: 感謝您於今日訓練中的積極參與。

all.en: Practical role-play exercises help participants internalize abstract cultural concepts faster.
all.zh: 實作角色扮演練習有助參與者更快內化抽象文化概念。

all.en: Pair up with someone from a different region for the role-play activity.
all.zh: 請與來自不同地區的同事配對進行角色扮演活動。

all.en: Each pair will receive a business scenario and a hidden cultural constraint.
all.zh: 每組將獲得一個商業情境及一個隱藏的文化限制條件。

all.en: Spend ten minutes preparing, then perform the scenario before the class.
all.zh: 請花 10 分鐘準備，再於課堂前演出該情境。

all.en: Observers should note communication patterns rather than judge personal performance.
all.zh: 觀察者應關注溝通模式，而非評判個人表現。

all.en: Debrief discussion focuses on what worked and what triggered confusion.
all.zh: 檢討討論聚焦於成效良好之處及引發混淆之要素。

all.en: Our case study library houses real anonymized incidents from internal projects.
all.zh: 本案例研究庫收錄來自內部專案的真實匿名案例。

all.en: Browse the library for inspiration when preparing your reflection assignment.
all.zh: 撰寫省思作業時，可瀏覽該庫尋找靈感。

all.en: Remember that cultural awareness is a journey rather than a destination.
all.zh: 請謹記文化覺察是一段歷程而非終點。

all.en: Continued curiosity and respect remain the most important traits in global work.
all.zh: 持續的好奇心與尊重始終是全球工作中最重要的特質。

all.en: Honestly, my first trip to a partner office in Brazil taught me more than any training slide ever could.
all.zh: 老實說，我第一次去巴西的合作辦公室出差，學到的東西比任何訓練投影片都多。

all.en: I arrived expecting to start meetings on the dot and ended up having espresso for forty minutes first.
all.zh: 我本來預期會議會準時開始，結果先喝了四十分鐘的義式濃縮。

all.en: By the time we sat down, I already trusted the team more than I had after months of emails.
all.zh: 等到我們真的坐下來時，我對團隊的信任已經超越了過去幾個月的郵件累積。

all.en: Sometimes the slow build is exactly the productivity, just in a form we are not used to recognizing.
all.zh: 有時候，這種慢慢培養的過程本身就是一種生產力，只是我們不習慣這樣看而已。

all.en: Please share one small habit you have changed since joining our global team this year.
all.zh: 請分享一個你今年加入全球團隊後改變的小習慣。

all.en: My own change is keeping a tiny world clock on my phone screen for our key cities.
all.zh: 我自己的改變，是在手機螢幕上保留一個小小的世界時鐘，標出我們的主要城市。

all.en: It prevents me from sending late night messages that would feel rude to a colleague abroad.
all.zh: 這樣可以避免我在深夜傳訊息，讓海外同事覺得不禮貌。

all.en: Another teammate started learning ten polite phrases in Korean before her Seoul visits.
all.zh: 另一位同事在去首爾出差前，開始學十句客氣的韓語片語。

all.en: Her hosts laughed warmly and went out of their way to help her on day one.
all.zh: 東道主笑得很開心，第一天就特別熱情地照顧她。

all.en: Curiosity costs nothing, but it opens doors that no business card alone could open.
all.zh: 好奇心不花錢，卻能打開那些光靠名片打不開的大門。
